model.name: Dixon-Coles Poisson + Monte Carlo (mominullptr WC2026 dataset)

disclaimer: Predictions from a Dixon-Coles model trained on historical results plus live WC2026 data from the mominullptr/FIFA-World-Cup-2026-Dataset (https://github.com/mominullptr/FIFA-World-Cup-2026-Dataset). Eliminated teams have p_win=0 by construction.
